LAW AND MOTION 301, CROSS-COMPLAINANT RICARDO ESCOBAR'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AS JUDGMENT, APPOINT AN ELISOR AND REMOVE CROSS-DEFENDANTS FROM PROPERTY. APPOINTMENT OF AN ELISOR WILL BE CONSIDERED IF AND WHEN ANY PARTY REFUSES TO SIGN APPROPRIATE DOCUMENTS NECESSARY TO CARRY OUT THE SETTLEMENT TERMS. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. MATTER WAS CALLED AT 9:59 AM AND PASSED. ALL PARTIES MET OUTSIDE TO AGREE ON A SETTLEMENT. MATTER WAS RECALLED AT 10:19 AM, AND The Court adopted it's tentative ruling as follows: CROSS COMPLAINANT RICARDO ESCOBAR'S Motion To Enforce Settlement As Judgment, Appoint An Elisor And Remove Cross Defts From Property. MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. ALL PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO PERFORM THEIR OBLIGATIONS UNDER THE SETTLEMENT AND JUDGMENT. APPOINTMENT OF AN ELISOR WILL BE CONSIDERED IF AND WHEN ANY PARTY REFUSES TO SIGN APPROPRIATE DOCUMENTS NECESSARY TO CARRY OUT THE SETTLEMENT TERMS. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/PJB/JF) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
